tools.name: check_service_availability
tools.description: Check availability, pricing, and scoping questions for a service in a location. Provide either city + state OR postalCode to specify the location.

tools.name: generate_deep_link
tools.description: Generate a pre-filled Taskrabbit booking deep link using task template ID.

tools.name: list_supported_services
tools.description: List Taskrabbit services, optionally filtered by location. Provide either city + state OR postalCode to filter by location.
